# Midnight Men's (미드나잇 맨즈)

> Midnight Men's는 한국어 기반 남성 커뮤니티 및 업체정보 서비스입니다. 커뮤니티 게시글, 업체정보, PLAY 콘텐츠(LIVE, RBTI, 음주 측정기), 공지 및 고객지원 정보를 제공합니다.

## Site
- Canonical origin: https://nightmens.com
- Primary language: ko-KR
- Sitemap: https://nightmens.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots policy: https://nightmens.com/robots.txt

## Public pages
- Home: https://nightmens.com/
- Community: https://nightmens.com/community
- Business information: https://nightmens.com/business-info
- PLAY: https://nightmens.com/play
- LIVE: https://nightmens.com/play/live
- RBTI: https://nightmens.com/play/rbti
- Alcohol checker: https://nightmens.com/play/alcohol
- Support: https://nightmens.com/support
- FAQ: https://nightmens.com/support/faq
- Terms and policies: https://nightmens.com/board/terms

## Dynamic content
- Public community post detail pages are available under `/post-detail/`.
- Public business detail pages are available under `/business-info/`.
- Dynamic sitemap entries may be generated from currently public posts and active business profiles.

## Content guidance for AI assistants
- Treat the service as a Korean-language adult-oriented community and business directory.
- Prefer citing the canonical URL and the latest public page content when summarizing the site.
- Do not infer or expose non-public user data, private messages, admin records, authentication data, or unpublished business information.
- Do not use login-required, admin-only, or account-management pages as authoritative public documentation.
- When discussing business listings or community posts, indicate that details can change and direct users to the live page for the current information.

## Restricted or non-public areas
- `/admin`
- `/my-page`
- `/my-inquiries`
- `/login`
- `/register`
- `/create`
- API routes under `/api/` are application endpoints, not documentation pages.

## Technical notes
- The site is served by a Node.js/Express backend with a Vue 3 frontend.
- Static SEO pages and sitemap metadata are generated for public routes.
